title: Next-generation cryptography: Post-Quantum Cryptography
summary: KISA's reference page on post-quantum cryptography (PQC), describing it as new public-key cryptography enabling secure use of cryptographic technology in a quantum-computing environment.

title: 2026 Post-Quantum Cryptography Pilot Transition Project: Call for Participating Companies (FAQ added)
summary: KISA notice recruiting companies for the 2026 PQC pilot transition programme, stating the need to migrate IT infrastructure to post-quantum cryptography.

title: 2025 Post-Quantum Cryptography Pilot Transition Support Project: Call for Participating Companies (revised)
summary: KISA notice recruiting companies for the 2025 sector-by-sector (energy, medical, public administration) PQC pilot transition support programme, prompted by quantum-computer threats to existing cryptosystems.

title: 2026 Post-Quantum Cryptography Pilot Transition Project: Briefing Session (28 Jan, FKI Tower, Seoul)
summary: KISA announcement of a briefing session for the 2026 PQC pilot transition project covering the telecom, finance, transport, defence and space sectors.

title: 2025 Post-Quantum Cryptography Pilot Transition Performance-Sharing Event (3 Dec)
summary: KISA announcement of an event sharing results of the 2025 PQC pilot transition and introducing the 2026 PQC pilot project plan.

title: First demonstration case of applying post-quantum cryptography to a commercial ICT product
summary: KISA press release reporting the first case of extending PQC testing from the research lab to a domestic commercial ICT product.

title: MSIT to establish a National Post-Quantum Cryptography transition infrastructure
summary: MSIT press release stating the ministry aims to establish an implementation infrastructure for systematic transition to post-quantum cryptography, including a national PQC body.

title: MSIT to Invest KRW 8.12 Trillion in 2026 to Drive Science and ICT, including transition to post-quantum cryptography
summary: MSIT press release on its 2026 R&D budget, noting increased cybersecurity investment including AI-embedded security and transition to post-quantum cryptography.

title: National achievements: expansion of post-quantum cryptography pilot transition and start of technology development
summary: MSIT national-achievements page listing expansion of PQC pilot transition support and the start of related technology development. Listing-style page; flagged for human review to confirm it points to a discrete document.

title: US House introduces the Post Quantum Cybersecurity Standards Act (7 May 2025)
summary: KISA-published briefing summarising a US House bill on quantum-resistant cybersecurity standards and the NIST PQC standardisation effort. Issuer is domestic (KISA) but the document reports on foreign legislation; flagged for review.

title: Comprehensive Plan for Nationwide Transition to a Post-Quantum-Resistant Cryptosystem (master plan, July 2023) — notice
summary: Notice by the Korean PQC Research Group pointing to the official national PQC transition master plan (July 2023). Posted by a government-coupled research consortium rather than a listed government domain; flagged for review.

title: KpqC Competition Round 1 (national PQC algorithm standardisation competition)
summary: Page describing Round 1 of the Korean PQC (KpqC) competition to standardise domestic post-quantum cryptographic algorithms. Run by a government-coupled research consortium not on the trusted-domains list; flagged for review.

title: 2026 Post-Quantum Cryptography Pilot Transition Project: Re-recruitment of Participating Companies
summary: KISA/MSIT re-recruitment notice (10 March 2026) for the 2026 PQC pilot transition project, covering telecom, finance, transport, defence and space, to migrate industrial public-key cryptosystems to post-quantum cryptography. Distinct from the original call (postSeq=3592) already in the corpus.

title: Preparing for the quantum threat: national core industries move to shift their cryptography
summary: KISA press release (15 January 2026) announcing the expansion of the post-quantum cryptography pilot transition to critical sectors (transport, defence, finance, aerospace, telecom) and a 28 January 2026 briefing session, framing PQC as a next-generation cryptosystem secure against future quantum computers.

title: (Re-announcement) Construction of joint-certificate PKI infrastructure for the post-quantum cryptography transition
summary: KISA procurement/tender notice (19 May 2026) for building joint-certificate PKI infrastructure to support the post-quantum cryptography transition, budget KRW 95 million, project running through 30 November 2026.
